name: Coconut/Chocolate Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and cocoa.
2. Add the sweetened condensed milk and water to the mixture.
3. Boil until it reaches a soft ball stage (234°F to 238°F).
4. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. Stir in the coconut flakes and chopped nuts.
6. Add the butter or margarine and vanilla extract.
7. Beat the mixture until it begins to thicken slightly.
8. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper, forming small patties.
